text: Sigma rule: Suspicious PowerShell Invocation - Detects suspicious PowerShell execution patterns including encoded commands and hidden execution.
Sigma rule: Malicious Email Attachment - Detects emails with suspicious attachments commonly used in phishing campaigns.
Sigma rule: Cobalt Strike Beacon Detection - Detects network indicators associated with Cobalt Strike beacon communications.
Sigma rule: LSASS Access for Credential Dumping - Detects attempts to access LSASS process memory for credential theft.
Sigma rule: Ransomware File Encryption - Detects mass file encryption events indicative of ransomware activity.
Sigma rule: DNS Query for Malicious Domain - Detects DNS queries to known malicious or suspicious domains.
Sigma rule: Suspicious Scheduled Task Creation - Detects creation of scheduled tasks by non-admin users or unusual processes.
Sigma rule: Pass-the-Hash Detection - Detects authentication attempts using NTLM hashes without password.
Sigma rule: Port Scan Detection - Detects reconnaissance activities through port scanning patterns.
Sigma rule: Data Exfiltration via DNS - Detects DNS tunneling and data exfiltration via DNS queries.
